rt-centred-maxwidth: AMBIGUOUS SELECTOR: '.wp-block-sgs-container' matched 2 elements on the live page — used the LAST (innermost) match; verify this is genuinely this fixture's own instance, not a page-level wrapper.
sgs-accordion-item: COMPOSITION-INVALID: sgs/accordion-item (requires sgs/accordion). This fixture clones a parent-constrained block as a standalone top-level section, so parent-provided CSS + block context can never apply. Any 'missing' style here is the fixture's composition, not a converter defect — cells are reported UNVERIFIED, never scored. Fix by nesting the child inside its parent in the fixture.
